raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I purchased a computer monitor as a XXXX present for my grandson. On XXXX morning he connected the monitor to his computer and the monitor didnt work. On Friday, XX/XX/XXXX, I sent the monitor back to Best Buy via XXXX. On Monday, XX/XX/XXXX the XXXX package was received and signed for in the Best Buy XXXX, Wyoming facility. The XXXX tracking number of the package is : XXXX. I have to date not received a credit for the returned merchandise. The purchase price with tax is {$110.00}. Best Buy is expecting me to pay for the monitor that I returned to them.
